title: CITY OF PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION - 211info
text: PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION CITY OF PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides cultural, athletic, fitness (youth and adult sports), dance, music, science, language, and swimming. Parent and child activity groups are available. Drop-in sports schedule and indoor park schedule on website. Offers a variety of outdoor education that focuses on environmental stewardship and nature connection, including field trips, summer camps, and guided walks. Volunteer opportunities are available. Operates and maintains city parks, gardens, racquet centers, golf courses, natural areas, hiking trails, the Portland International Raceway, and community centers. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Activities and classes available for all ages, with special programs for young children, youth, older adults, and adults with disabilities. Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Hours vary at recreation sites Email (503) 823-7529 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-2525 Customer Service Center (503) 858-9744 Other Modification requests Main phone (503) 823-7529 TTY/TTD (503) 823-6868 Other (503) 858-9744 Modification request Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Call to discuss discounts available to foster families. Scholarships may be available. DOCUMENTS: Varies by program. Foster family discount must provide a letter from a foster caseworker. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Outdoor Environmental Education Public Parks Recreation Centers Swimming Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PORTLAND PARKS PRESCHOOL FOOD - COMMUNITY GARDENS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ACCESS DISCOUNT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
